title: Option A: Emergency SPR Release & Cape Reroute
summary: Release 2.4M bpd from Cushing SPR reserves while directing tankers around Cape of Good Hope.
pros: Immediate stabilization of domestic refinery inventory
cons: Depletes SPR capacity by 8.5% over 30 days
Higher fuel freight costs for shippers

title: Option B: Naval Escort & Hormuz Passage
summary: Deploy Coalition naval escorts to convoy commercial crude tankers through Strait of Hormuz.
pros: Lower freight cost compared to Cape diversion

title: Option C: Strategic Import Swap & Grid Rationing
summary: Activate energy trade swaps with West African producers and enforce 5% industrial grid load shedding.
